name: 乾為天
keywords_en: active, bold, idealistic, soaring, pure yang, authority, new ventures, leadership, ambition, overreach
judgment_en: Pure creative force. Sublime success through perseverance.
symbolism_en: Six unbroken lines — the most powerful symbol of creative energy. Initiative, expansion, and spiritual independence. Act boldly, but guard against arrogance. Moderation is what keeps the dragon airborne.

lines_en.1: Your strength is not yet recognized. Endure quietly and build your foundation.
lines_en.2: You begin to emerge. Stay humble and listen to those around you.
lines_en.3: Devote yourself fully to your work. Proceed with care and steady persistence.
lines_en.4: The leap is near, but danger still remains. Do not lose your vigilance.
lines_en.5: You are perfectly in your element. A truly auspicious time.
lines_en.6: The dragon has soared too high. It is already time to descend.

name: 坤為地
keywords_en: receptive, gentle, humble, nurturing, supportive, patient, yielding, slow but sure
judgment_en: Receptive earth. Sublime success through the steadfastness of a mare.
symbolism_en: Six broken lines — pure receptive energy. Like the earth, it receives and nurtures all things. Strength comes not from pushing forward but from sustaining others. Sincerity and patience will yield visible results in time.

lines_en.1: Thin frost underfoot can become thick ice without warning. Heed small troubles before they grow.
lines_en.2: You are honest, virtuous, and upright. Continue on this path with confidence.
lines_en.3: Devote yourself to your work without seeking the spotlight. Finish what is dull but necessary.
lines_en.4: Words invite disaster. Speak carefully, spend wisely, and move with quiet dignity.
lines_en.5: You are in a state of genuine humility and calm. This is admirable.
lines_en.6: A dragon forced into battle in the open field bleeds. Pushing ever upward leads only to wounds.

name: 水雷屯
keywords_en: genesis, chaos, first steps, frustration, stagnation, birth pangs, latent potential
judgment_en: Difficult beginnings. Great perseverance brings success. Seek guidance.
symbolism_en: The chaos of all beginnings — the struggle before form emerges. Even when plans seem stuck, growth is happening beneath the surface. Steady the foundations, gather strength, and let time do its work.

lines_en.1: This may not be where you wish to be, but stand still like a great stone. Do not move.
lines_en.2: Your hardship will not lift soon. Do not force your way — focus on building real capability.
lines_en.3: To press further is to lose your way entirely. Stop here.
lines_en.4: Do not advance on your own. Respond when called upon. Cooperation will be your power.
lines_en.5: Now is not the time for grand ambitions. Focus only on small, achievable tasks.
lines_en.6: You moved when you should have stayed still. You stand alone now. Yet even at rock bottom, light lies ahead.

name: 山水蒙
keywords_en: ignorance, immaturity, obscured vision, uncertainty, youth, difficult judgment, wandering
judgment_en: Youthful folly. Success through sincere instruction. Perseverance furthers.
symbolism_en: Ignorance and immaturity — but also the potential for learning and growth. When nothing is clear, what matters is seeking the right teacher with an honest heart. The willingness to learn is the key that unlocks the future.

lines_en.1: Begin firmly. Discipline is necessary at the outset — but know its limits.
lines_en.2: The way is unclear and problems abound, yet do not give up. Trust your capacity to find answers.
lines_en.3: You are rushing toward foolishness. Stop and ask whether your direction is truly right.
lines_en.4: Your isolation comes from refusing to hear others. Feeling your way blindly is dangerous. Let go of stubbornness.
lines_en.5: An open and eager attitude toward learning is what brings growth. Childlike humility opens the future.
lines_en.6: Guard your words and actions lest ignorance make enemies. Clarity will come gradually. Avoid force.

name: 水天需
keywords_en: nourishing, patient waiting, unhurried, watchful, good things come to those who wait
judgment_en: Waiting with sincerity brings great success. Perseverance is auspicious.
symbolism_en: The value of waiting. Beneath the still surface, things are moving. To act in haste would disrupt the current and scatter the opportunity. The task is to trust the timing and remain ready.

lines_en.1: You are far from the center. Stay the course and wait — do not change your approach.
lines_en.2: There may be minor friction, but the outcome will be good. Avoid conflict and stay steady.
lines_en.3: To move now is to invite harm. Stay still and breathe.
lines_en.4: You are deep in difficulty, but strong help will come. Wait for the moment of escape.
lines_en.5: The ferry is almost here. Rest in calm and peaceful readiness.
lines_en.6: The waiting is nearly over. Help will come from an unexpected source. Receive it graciously.

name: 天水訟
keywords_en: conflict, dispute, discord, blame, disagreement, opposition, division, losing is winning
judgment_en: Conflict. Be sincere but cautious. Halting midway brings good fortune. Pressing to the end brings misfortune.
symbolism_en: Opposition and misunderstanding. Emotional clashes arise easily now, but pursuing victory only deepens the wound. Harmony and dialogue, not conquest, are what this moment requires.

lines_en.1: There has been a mistake. Do not cling to small grievances — withdrawing early from conflict is wisdom.
lines_en.2: You cannot win this. Do not vent your frustration impulsively. Retreat for now.
lines_en.3: What you have done consistently, however ordinary, is your greatest asset now. Restlessness will harm you.
lines_en.4: Even with fighting spirit, you cannot win this dispute. Return to your original purpose.
lines_en.5: You have the strength and standing to prevail. Seek resolution decisively.
lines_en.6: Even a temporary victory will cost you trust and leave you hollow. Examine how you have been proceeding.

name: 地水師
keywords_en: discipline, order, mobilization, conflict, command, rules, struggle, busy
judgment_en: The army. Perseverance and a strong leader bring good fortune. No blame.
symbolism_en: The power to lead a group through organized action. What is needed is not brute force but order, discipline, and leadership that earns trust. Consistency and sincerity unite people far better than intimidation.

lines_en.1: Discipline is everything. Examine your habits and set your course with clear resolve.
lines_en.2: You are a capable leader. Trust and recognition will come, and your abilities will shine.
lines_en.3: Your assessment is off and your strength insufficient. This is a losing battle. Watch for illness and injury.
lines_en.4: A strategic retreat is itself a form of action. Step back now and observe.
lines_en.5: Narrow the problem to one thing and see it through entirely. Half-measures are the worst outcome.
lines_en.6: The struggle is nearly over. Reward is coming. Now is the time to think about what comes after.

name: 水地比
keywords_en: abundance, harmony, fellowship, relationships, kindred spirits, trust, connection, mutual support
judgment_en: Union. Good fortune. Those who are late will meet misfortune.
symbolism_en: The bonds between people — trust, warmth, and mutual belonging. Lean in, help, and walk together. Yet closeness without integrity does not last. Every relationship rests finally on sincerity.

lines_en.1: Genuine effort and an unadorned heart will move others. Unexpected allies will appear.
lines_en.2: Deepen your existing bonds with sincerity and good support will follow.
lines_en.3: The people you are currently close to may not be what they seem. Exercise caution.
lines_en.4: Broadening your circle to include unfamiliar people will expand your perspective.
lines_en.5: Do not seek immediate gain from relationships. Build with a long view and keep connections honest.
lines_en.6: There is no one to turn to. This is a time of abandonment and solitude.

name: 風天小畜
keywords_en: restraint, preparation, accumulation, patience, gentle holding back, not yet ready, small steps
judgment_en: Small restraint. Clouds gather but no rain falls. Persevere.
symbolism_en: Not grand results, but quiet preparation. The current seems still, yet beneath it forces are gathering. Attend carefully to small things. What is built slowly and steadily will one day yield a great harvest.

lines_en.1: The timing is off and frustration mounts. Do not push forward — wait for the moment to ripen.
lines_en.2: Relationships will restore balance. Listen openly to others and allow yourself to be guided.
lines_en.3: Internal division among allies threatens to undo what matters most. Ease off the pressure.
lines_en.4: The wound has drained and the anxiety has cleared. A difficult problem is finding its resolution. Stay calm.
lines_en.5: A time to celebrate success with companions. Sincerity flows between you. This is a good time.
lines_en.6: The goal has been reached, yet discontent lingers. The closer success, the more restraint and humility are needed.

name: 天沢履
keywords_en: caution, propriety, risk, stepping forward, careful conduct, etiquette, slow advance
judgment_en: Treading on the tiger's tail. It does not bite. Success.
symbolism_en: Moving through danger with exquisite care. Like stepping on a tiger's tail — one wrong move and all is lost. Yet with propriety, composure, and respect for others, even the most precarious path can be walked safely.

lines_en.1: Honor what is plain and unadorned. This is a time for simplicity.
lines_en.2: Do not be swayed by the noise around you. Walk your path quietly. Avoid drawing attention.
lines_en.3: Bluster without ability invites harm. There is a problem with how you are thinking and moving.
lines_en.4: You have stepped on the tiger's tail. Danger surrounds you — but careful conduct will see you through.
lines_en.5: You have both the confidence and the capability to face this crisis boldly.
lines_en.6: Look back at the path you have walked. If it was mistaken, change course. A good time for redirection.

name: 地天泰
keywords_en: harmony, peace, abundance, smooth flow, balance, good communication, stability
judgment_en: Peace. The small departs, the great arrives. Good fortune through perseverance.
symbolism_en: Heaven and earth in perfect communion — all things flow harmoniously. Yin and yang are balanced. Relationships, work, and home all share in the warmth of this flourishing. Yet in times of good fortune, humility matters most.

lines_en.1: Use the full strength of your team and advance. This is a good time.
lines_en.2: Act boldly, but with meticulous care and attention to others.
lines_en.3: What seems like stagnation conceals movement beneath the surface. Persevere without worry.
lines_en.4: Open your heart and meet your companions as equals. Let go of any sense of superiority.
lines_en.5: Investing in human connections will bring diverse relationships that serve your larger purpose.
lines_en.6: Bonds are breaking and what was built begins to crumble. Discord spreads and unity falters.

name: 天地否
keywords_en: stagnation, decline, disconnection, misunderstanding, isolation, blocked, hardship before flourishing
judgment_en: Standstill. The great departs, the small arrives. Perseverance for the noble one.
symbolism_en: Heaven and earth are estranged — energies pass each other without meeting. Communication breaks down, misunderstanding spreads, isolation deepens. Yet this is precisely the time to strengthen the inner self. Do not force movement. Wait, and the cycle will turn.

lines_en.1: Accept what must be accepted without being troubled by the standstill. Good results will follow.
lines_en.2: Cut ties cleanly with those who pull you toward harm. Guard your own path.
lines_en.3: You carry an inner conflict — guilt or unease gnaws at you. There is a problem with the way you are proceeding.
lines_en.4: Those who share your vision will help you succeed. Follow what you know to be right.
lines_en.5: The suffering eases briefly and you can breathe again. But hardship will return — stay alert.
lines_en.6: You have endured a long darkness. The light is not yet full, but it is beginning to break through.

name: 天火同人
keywords_en: community, allies, shared purpose, resonance, solidarity, dialogue, connection, advancement
judgment_en: Fellowship in the open. Success. It furthers to cross great waters.
symbolism_en: The power of those united by shared purpose. What cannot be achieved alone becomes possible through genuine alliance. This is a time for building trust, sharing values, and advancing together. Sincerity is the foundation of every lasting bond.

lines_en.1: Open your heart wide. Release old attachments and step into a freer world.
lines_en.2: Look beyond your familiar circle. Now is the time to actively broaden your connections.
lines_en.3: You are clinging to something unsuitable or out of reach. It is better to let it go.
lines_en.4: This aspiration exceeds your capacity. Do not pursue it further. Turn toward something new.
lines_en.5: Early difficulties give way to laughter. You will reunite with your companions. A good time.
lines_en.6: You are entering a solitary phase, stepping away from old ties. It does not matter if no one understands.

name: 火天大有
keywords_en: possession, fruition, achievement, natural gathering, leadership, prestige, reputation, peak
judgment_en: Great possession. Sublime success.
symbolism_en: Great material and spiritual abundance — achievement, fame, and the gathering of all good things. This is a peak of prosperity. Yet it is precisely in abundance that arrogance and complacency are born. The question this hexagram asks is: what is the character of one who has much?

lines_en.1: A fine start toward great possession. This is a good time to lay solid foundations.
lines_en.2: Steady and strong as a great wagon, you can bear any load. Give full expression to your abilities.
lines_en.3: Approach this with generosity, not pettiness. Give your full sincerity.
lines_en.4: You have the momentum to surpass even the powerful. As long as you remain humble, all will be well.
lines_en.5: You embody both warmth and dignity. This is admirable.
lines_en.6: You possess greatly and all flows well. Do not forget gratitude for the gifts of heaven.

name: 地山謙
keywords_en: humility, modesty, inner strength, lifelong learning, respect, quiet achievement, bend first then rise
judgment_en: Modesty. The noble one brings things to completion.
symbolism_en: The mountain hidden beneath the earth — strength concealed in quietness. Holding back rather than displaying, refining within rather than proclaiming without. Trust gathers naturally around one who is genuinely modest, and fortune opens of its own accord.

lines_en.1: To be the unseen foundation is to become the force that drives great things. A good time.
lines_en.2: The world will not overlook your humble capability — recognition will come to you.
lines_en.3: Hardship will be rewarded if you see it through. Be cautious in matters of romance.
lines_en.4: Express the full virtue of humility. Do so, and nothing will stand in your way.
lines_en.5: If you conduct yourself with dignity, you may act decisively even against those who will not listen.
lines_en.6: The outward form is admirable, but within there are seeds of contradiction. Do not look away from them.

name: 雷地豫
keywords_en: music, joy, momentum, action, forward movement, vitality, new beginnings, preparation
judgment_en: Enthusiasm. Perseverance brings good fortune. No blame.
symbolism_en: Leading through joy, preparing with bright anticipation. A time filled with hope, when people are easily inspired and cooperation flows naturally. Yet if elation turns to idleness, or action loses foresight, unexpected pitfalls await. Keep your footing and build for what lies ahead.

lines_en.1: To revel without ability or foundation is a mistake. There is a problem with how you are proceeding.
lines_en.2: Resist temptation and hold on with everything you have. That steadfastness will carry you through.
lines_en.3: Are you reaching beyond what is real? Know your place and act within your means.
lines_en.4: People are drawn to you. Trust runs deep and good allies are near. A good time.
lines_en.5: One persistent difficulty actually works in the larger whole's favor. A thorn that protects.
lines_en.6: You are lost in pleasure, walking a road toward ruin. Wake up before it is too late.

name: 沢雷随
keywords_en: following, adaptability, flow, timing, flexibility, harmony, willing compliance
judgment_en: Following. Sublime success. Perseverance brings good fortune. No blame.
symbolism_en: To follow with awareness, not drift without will. When you release rigid attachment to your own view and move with the current of circumstances, the way opens. True following is not weakness — it is strength expressed through suppleness.

lines_en.1: Step out of your shell and adapt to the flow of the times. A good moment for a change of direction.
lines_en.2: Clinging to small gains will cost you larger ones. Discern what truly matters most.
lines_en.3: Align yourself with capable people and you will find what you seek. Think long-term and act with composure.
lines_en.4: You gain, but others will eye you with suspicion. If your means were honest, there is nothing to fear.
lines_en.5: Relationships and circumstances all work in your favor. A good time.
lines_en.6: You feel bound and unable to move freely. Yet if you are following someone trustworthy, this is not a problem.

name: 山風蠱
title_en: Work on What Has Been Spoiled
keywords_en: decay, corruption, reform, restoration, inner work, turning misfortune to fortune, radical remedy
judgment_en: Work on what has been spoiled. Sublime success. It furthers to cross great waters.
symbolism_en: What has rotted must be cleared away before new growth can begin. This is a time to face distortion in organizations, relationships, or within yourself — and to act with courage. Destruction without the will to rebuild is meaningless. The question is not who is to blame, but how to restore.

lines_en.1: What needs correcting can be corrected. There is some danger, but ultimately it leads to good.
lines_en.2: Do not use harsh remedies. Reform gently and with flexibility.
lines_en.3: The decay runs deep and the risk is real, but persistence will see this through.
lines_en.4: Your attempt at reform makes things worse. There is a problem with your approach.
lines_en.5: You successfully complete the reform and can claim it as your own achievement. Begin again with a clear heart.
lines_en.6: This is not about power or money — it is pure mission. You act to purge corruption for its own sake.

name: 地沢臨
keywords_en: approach, guidance, growth, leadership, nurturing, encouragement, trust, warmth
judgment_en: Approach. Sublime success. Perseverance brings no blame.
symbolism_en: The joy of guiding and watching others grow. Those in a position of leadership should approach from alongside, not above. And those growing should move steadily, without haste. Flexible, patient advancement draws good fortune.

lines_en.1: Trust your instincts and move closer. The posture of approach matters.
lines_en.2: Sincerity and capability together earn trust. Everything proceeds smoothly. A good time.
lines_en.3: Charm without genuine guidance is not enough — though if you already see this, it is not a problem.
lines_en.4: You approach with wholehearted sincerity. All is well. A good time.
lines_en.5: You understand what you are approaching and why. You carry yourself like a sovereign. A very good time.
lines_en.6: Humble, honest, and full of care — this will work out. A very good time.

name: 風地観
keywords_en: observation, introspection, influence by example, quiet authority, showing the way, helping others
judgment_en: Contemplation. Hands washed, the offering not yet made. Sincerity and dignity.
symbolism_en: To see clearly — yourself and the world around you. What has been invisible becomes apparent through still, patient observation. And remember: you too are being observed. That awareness breeds care, honesty, and the kind of conduct that quietly moves others.

lines_en.1: You see with a child's eyes — the surface only. This will cause problems if left unchanged.
lines_en.2: You can manage small matters well, but large ones remain beyond your sight.
lines_en.3: Know yourself with clear eyes. Proceed step by step, in proportion to who you are.
lines_en.4: Observe thoroughly, think carefully, then act. The results will come. A good time.
lines_en.5: Reflect on yourself with honest objectivity. Self-examination removes all problems.
lines_en.6: Turn your gaze to the broader movements of the world. There is no problem. A good time.

name: 火雷噬嗑
keywords_en: obstacles, discipline, friction, resistance, decisive action, justice, correction
judgment_en: Biting through. Success. It furthers to let justice be administered.
symbolism_en: Bite through what stands in the way. Ambiguity must be dissolved, the problem made clear. This is a time to act with fairness and decisiveness — not with brute force, but with the clarity of right judgment. The courage to name what is wrong is what brings resolution.

lines_en.1: A small punishment will be highly effective against a minor offender. Do not press further.
lines_en.2: Your opponent is formidable. Do not clash head-on — use patience and a softer approach.
lines_en.3: Your target has hidden motives and this task is harder than expected. Reconsider.
lines_en.4: The effort is worth it and real results are within reach. This is the moment to push through.
lines_en.5: There is some risk, but persisting to the end yields unexpected benefit. A good time.
lines_en.6: You set out to overcome the other and end up wounded instead. There is a problem with your approach.

name: 山火賁
keywords_en: adornment, grace, refinement, elegance, appearance, etiquette, charm, beauty, small achievements
judgment_en: Grace. Success in small matters.
symbolism_en: The power of beauty and refined expression. When inner truth is clothed in appropriate form, harmony with others and with one's environment deepens. Aesthetics, manners, and presentation can be auspicious — but hollow ornament turns against itself. Seek beauty that is earned.

lines_en.1: Compete with what is genuinely yours. Do not over-adorn — let substance speak.
lines_en.2: Keep the substance and add thoughtful craft. How might you present this more beautifully?
lines_en.3: Much adornment surrounds you and you shine — but do not lose sight of your original purpose.
lines_en.4: Cutting through the glamour to hold fast to an unadorned heart will ultimately be rewarded.
lines_en.5: Simplicity and essence matter here. Keep ornamentation minimal. That restraint leads to the best outcome.
lines_en.6: You are in a passage of stripping away. What remains after all the additions are removed is what is real.

name: 山地剥
keywords_en: collapse, decay, instability, decline, erosion, loss of trust, holding on
judgment_en: Splitting apart. Perseverance brings misfortune. It does not further to go anywhere.
symbolism_en: What has been built is slowly falling away. The signs of erosion are already visible. This is not a time to push forward but to hold steady, protect what remains, and look honestly at your foundations. Endurance is what is asked of you now.

lines_en.1: The ground beneath you is beginning to shift. An unstable situation is taking shape.
lines_en.2: Disorder is closing in. Resistance is futile — you must think carefully about how to respond.
lines_en.3: Even in the midst of chaos, you can gain insight into what is happening. Trust that insight.
lines_en.4: You are in the thick of crisis. There is nothing to do but endure until it passes.
lines_en.5: The turbulence gradually subsides. Collect yourself and begin to make sense of things.
lines_en.6: What survives the collapse is real. Hold it carefully — it is what matters.

name: 地雷復
keywords_en: return, renewal, recovery, hope, new beginning, one step at a time, solstice, restoration
judgment_en: Return. Success. Coming and going without error. Friends arrive without blame. The way is repeated. Seven days bring return. It furthers to have somewhere to go.
symbolism_en: After failure or stagnation, new possibility returns. This is a moment to begin again — to correct past errors and find the way back to what is essential. Do not rush. The most important thing is to return to your own center.

lines_en.1: You may have strayed from the path, but you will find your way back before long. No problem.
lines_en.2: Return to what is right and try again. A good time.
lines_en.3: It may feel like you are going in circles. But repetition here is not failure — it is necessary.
lines_en.4: With firm intention, return from wherever you have drifted to the place that is truly yours.
lines_en.5: You have come back to where you must be, and from here you set out again. A true turning point.
lines_en.6: If you do not return to the right path, the worst will follow. Turn back now and a new road will appear.

name: 天雷无妄
keywords_en: innocence, sincerity, spontaneity, natural order, pure motive, honesty, unexpected events
judgment_en: Innocence. Sublime success. Perseverance furthers.
symbolism_en: Abandon calculation and act from a pure heart. When motive is free of self-interest, the natural order supports you. This is not naivety — it is the courage to act without guile. Honesty without artifice is the most powerful force available now.

lines_en.1: Follow what is right and move without scheming. Things will go well.
lines_en.2: What you never planned or hoped for may come to pass of its own accord.
lines_en.3: An unforeseen misfortune may fall upon you. Accept it as the dispensation of heaven.
lines_en.4: Move with the natural current and remain unmoved by what arises. This is the right way.
lines_en.5: Do not struggle against the flow. Watch with a natural mind and let things unfold.
lines_en.6: Nothing goes right — but this is not your fault. It is simply that season. Wait for the tide to turn.

name: 山天大畜
title_en: The Taming Power of the Great
keywords_en: accumulation, preparation, restraint, patience, building on solid ground, serving others, careful timing
judgment_en: Great taming. Perseverance brings good fortune. It furthers to cross great waters.
symbolism_en: Do not move yet. The mountain holds heaven in check — great force is contained, not spent. This is a time to accumulate knowledge, relationships, and inner strength. When the moment arrives, what has been carefully stored will be released to full effect.

lines_en.1: There are still unsteady elements. Do not yet venture out into the wider world.
lines_en.2: Strength has been building, but now is the time to hold your position and maintain what you have.
lines_en.3: What has long been stored is ready to move. The moment has come — set out with full resolve.
lines_en.4: Even with some constraint and limitation, things proceed smoothly and at the right pace.
lines_en.5: You have great reserves and room to maneuver. Think broadly about how to use your resources.
lines_en.6: What you have stored through patient effort can now be expressed in full. A long-held hope is realized. A very good time.

name: 山雷頤
keywords_en: nourishment, diet, words, conduct, inner cultivation, what you consume, self-reliance, care for others
judgment_en: Nourishment. Perseverance brings good fortune. Observe what you take in.
symbolism_en: What feeds you — in body, mind, and spirit — shapes what you become. This is a time to examine what you are consuming and what you are offering to others. Not just food, but words, habits, and the company you keep. Choose with care.

lines_en.1: You are capable of standing alone, yet you reach for others to lean on. The result will not be good.
lines_en.2: Face reality directly. Cut dependency and turn honestly toward yourself.
lines_en.3: Your thinking is mistaken. Do not give up in resignation — consider calmly what truly nourishes you.
lines_en.4: To grow, reach outward and take in what others can offer. Be hungry for what develops you.
lines_en.5: If you cannot manage alone, entrust it to someone capable. Do not carry everything yourself.
lines_en.6: You are entering a passage where full responsibility falls to you. Take the significant step that is before you.

name: 沢風大過
keywords_en: excess, burden, instability, overload, bold action, limits, imbalance, critical mass
judgment_en: The ridgepole sags. It furthers to have somewhere to go. Success.
symbolism_en: The structure is under strain — too much weight, too much pressure, too much carried alone. Something must give. Yet within this extremity lies the seed of transformation. The question is not whether to act, but how far you can bear what you carry.

lines_en.1: Proceed carefully and receptively and things will go surprisingly well.
lines_en.2: When all seems lost, signs of recovery appear. This is your chance — press on.
lines_en.3: The load is too heavy and no help comes. There is no way out. There is a problem with how you are proceeding.
lines_en.4: You bear the weight with dignity and good results follow. Do not complicate it further — keep going.
lines_en.5: There is no point in continuing this particular effort. More will not change the outcome.
lines_en.6: To take on something far beyond your capacity risks destroying yourself entirely.

name: 坎為水
keywords_en: danger, hardship, abyss, repeated trials, perseverance, wisdom through difficulty, endurance
judgment_en: The abyss, repeated. Sincerity in the heart. Success through perseverance.
symbolism_en: The pit appears again and again. Danger does not relent. Yet water, finding no way through, simply keeps flowing — and eventually passes. Inner steadiness under repeated trial is what this hexagram asks for. Do not panic. Do not freeze. Move through.

lines_en.1: You have fallen into a deep pit. A time of darkness and groping for direction.
lines_en.2: You are still in difficulty, but small openings exist. Work with what little is possible.
lines_en.3: Every direction carries danger. You are at a loss. There is a problem with how you are proceeding.
lines_en.4: Move humbly and simply, with sincerity. An unexpected way through will appear. Avoid all pretense.
lines_en.5: The worst of the difficulty has passed. A glimmer of hope appears ahead. Build the foundation now.
lines_en.6: The hardship seems without end and you cannot move. There is a problem with how you are proceeding.

name: 離為火
keywords_en: clarity, intelligence, light, attachment, mutual dependence, illumination, brilliance, awareness
judgment_en: The clinging. Perseverance brings success. Care for the cow brings good fortune.
symbolism_en: Fire clings to what it burns, and light depends on what it illuminates. This is a time for clarity of mind and honest perception — but also for recognizing what you depend upon. The brilliance available now belongs to those who are grounded and do not grasp.

lines_en.1: Do not wander without direction or method. Settle your thinking before you move.
lines_en.2: You are where you belong. This is your place to shine — give it everything.
lines_en.3: This is a finale. It may feel like loss, but what is not released cannot make room for what is next.
lines_en.4: Forcing things only creates resistance. Your impatience is the problem — address it.
lines_en.5: Whatever surrounds you, this is where you belong. Continuing here is how you become luminous.
lines_en.6: The momentum is with you now and the problem is clear. Engage directly and decisively.

name: 沢山咸
keywords_en: influence, resonance, attraction, feeling, intuition, connection, rapport, swift resolution
judgment_en: Influence. Success. Perseverance furthers. Taking a wife brings good fortune.
symbolism_en: Hearts move toward each other. In love, friendship, and all human dealings, something passes between people without words. This is a time of genuine resonance — to give and receive influence with an honest and open spirit. Sincerity is what deepens every bond.

lines_en.1: A faint feeling stirs, like a tremor in the toe. Observe it quietly for now.
lines_en.2: You are drawn by a compelling attraction — but do not act on it yet. Hold steady.
lines_en.3: Something extraordinary appears before you. Do not let feeling alone drive you. Keep your composure.
lines_en.4: Trust your own sense of things. Whatever others may think, follow the path you know is right.
lines_en.5: This is a time to stay on your own course, undistracted. Some distance and even isolation is appropriate.
lines_en.6: What you feel is asking to be expressed. Do so — but with care, so it does not become mere surface talk.

name: 雷風恒
keywords_en: continuity, perseverance, constancy, daily practice, long-term commitment, endurance, steady progress
judgment_en: Duration. Success. No blame. Perseverance furthers.
symbolism_en: Not brilliance, but constancy. Not the single bold act, but the long accumulation of faithful days. In love, work, and conviction alike, what endures is what is built day by day without fanfare. The quiet steadiness of daily sincerity becomes, in time, an unshakeable trust.

lines_en.1: Ease the tension. Proceed naturally, without the weight of how things ought to be.
lines_en.2: Continuity is strength. Keep to your established course with patience. Hold to your center.
lines_en.3: You are distracted and wavering when the answer is already clear. Stop looking elsewhere and continue.
lines_en.4: Doing the same thing will not produce results this time. The goal remains — but the method needs rethinking.
lines_en.5: Stay responsive and adaptable, but hold to your core. Be faithful to yourself above all.
lines_en.6: You cannot stay still — your attention scatters in every direction. No amount of motion produces anything here.

name: 天山遯
keywords_en: retreat, withdrawal, distance, timing, release of attachment, rest, preparation, declining fortune
judgment_en: Retreat. Success in small matters. Perseverance furthers.
symbolism_en: To step back is not to lose. When the current runs against you, pressing forward only depletes. Release what clings, create distance, and wait. Knowing when to retreat — and doing so cleanly — is itself a form of mastery.

lines_en.1: You have hesitated too long and the chance to withdraw has passed. Stay still now and protect yourself.
lines_en.2: Since escape is no longer possible, hold your ground with firm resolve and a thick skin.
lines_en.3: You are bound by attachment when you should be stepping back. Decisiveness is what is needed.
lines_en.4: The time has come to step away, even from what you love.
lines_en.5: You can withdraw gracefully, leaving on your own terms.
lines_en.6: Achievement is complete. You can retire freely and enjoy the open space that follows.

name: 雷天大壮
keywords_en: power, momentum, expansion, overconfidence, energy, boldness, tension, impatience
judgment_en: Great power. Perseverance furthers.
symbolism_en: Great force is at work — yang energy surges and momentum builds. Yet power unchecked breaks through what it should not. Confidence and drive are assets only when matched with judgment and regard for others. The balance of courage and restraint is what turns strength into lasting progress.

lines_en.1: The will is there but the ability is not yet. Stop. Impatience now will cost you.
lines_en.2: Hold the position with integrity rather than reaching for more. Be deliberate and self-possessed.
lines_en.3: You are drunk on your own ability and moving recklessly. Cool down.
lines_en.4: Obstacles clear and the path opens. The momentum is real.
lines_en.5: You may lose something you valued — let it go. That is the right move.
lines_en.6: You have pushed past the right moment and are now stuck. Know your limits.

name: 火地晋
keywords_en: advancement, promotion, recognition, rapid progress, opportunity, ascent, gratitude
judgment_en: Progress. The sovereign grants horses in great numbers. Audiences granted three times in a day.
symbolism_en: The sun rises over the earth — conditions favor advancement and recognition. Go forward with confidence. This is a time when effort receives its due. Gratitude and proportion keep the good fortune from overreaching.

lines_en.1: Progress is blocked for now. A pause is in order. The opportunity will come.
lines_en.2: Help arrives from above, or an unexpected stroke of luck appears just when you had nearly given up.
lines_en.3: Others recognize and trust you. Support and cooperation open the way forward.
lines_en.4: Greed draws you toward dishonesty. Abandon the temptation and protect what matters.
lines_en.5: Obstacles dissolve. Ignore short-term gains and losses — simply press forward.
lines_en.6: The peak has already passed. Do not extend any further.

name: 地火明夷
keywords_en: obscured light, endurance, suppression, injustice, concealment, trial, silence, crouch before the leap
judgment_en: Darkening of the light. Perseverance in adversity furthers.
symbolism_en: The light is buried beneath the earth — not extinguished, but hidden. A time of injustice, misunderstanding, or forces that prevent your full expression. Keep the inner fire alive. Bend low, say little, and wait. This is not defeat — it is preservation.

lines_en.1: Nothing works and obstacles multiply. Withdraw immediately.
lines_en.2: A quick retreat limits the damage. A capable ally will appear.
lines_en.3: The decisive moment will come, but do not rush toward it.
lines_en.4: Go in with open eyes and you will understand what you are dealing with. Do not flee.
lines_en.5: You may not be able to show your true self in these conditions. Trust your own judgment and wait.
lines_en.6: Continuing down the wrong path will ultimately wound you. Enough.

name: 風火家人
keywords_en: family, inner order, roles, cooperation, warmth, education, harmony, tending the hearth
judgment_en: The family. Perseverance of the woman furthers.
symbolism_en: The household — and any group that functions like one — is held together by each person keeping their place and fulfilling their role with care. Warmth, trust, and shared responsibility make the small world stable. To set the outer world in order, begin within.

lines_en.1: The beginning matters most. Prepare carefully and act preventively from the start.
lines_en.2: Results may not yet show, but tending the inner life without haste is exactly right.
lines_en.3: Have you grown lax? This is a time that calls for more rigor, not less.
lines_en.4: Inner ease expands gradually into abundance and productive growth.
lines_en.5: The household is well ordered and stability deepens. Balance holds.
lines_en.6: Face yourself with full seriousness. Genuine confidence earned this way will see your wishes fulfilled.

name: 火沢睽
keywords_en: opposition, misunderstanding, divergence, alienation, difference, friction, polarity, seeds of harmony
judgment_en: Opposition. Success in small matters.
symbolism_en: Fire and water move in opposite directions — yet neither is wrong. This is a time of misunderstanding, conflicting values, and estrangement. Do not force convergence. The willingness to see what is genuinely different, rather than insisting on likeness, is what begins to restore harmony.

lines_en.1: Do not decide too quickly. Release what is drifting away and soften your resistance to what you dislike.
lines_en.2: You are separated and at odds — but do not worry. You will meet again.
lines_en.3: You face obstacle and resistance at every turn, but do not give up.
lines_en.4: You seem alone among strangers — yet within that difference, someone kindred may appear.
lines_en.5: Something stands between you and completion — but it will clear soon enough.
lines_en.6: Suspicion and isolation are based on misunderstanding. When the truth is known, resolution comes easily.

name: 水山蹇
keywords_en: obstacles, difficulty, blockage, detour, standstill, inner reflection, waiting, hardship as teacher
judgment_en: Obstruction. The southwest furthers. The northeast does not further. Perseverance brings good fortune.
symbolism_en: The path is blocked. To push is to exhaust yourself against a wall that will not move. Stop. Look inward. A different route exists — but finding it requires patience and a willingness to see the situation as it is, not as you wish it to be.

lines_en.1: To advance now is only to meet more difficulty. Wait without moving.
lines_en.2: You have no choice but to do what must be done, regardless of your own condition.
lines_en.3: Reconsider whether to proceed. If the way is difficult, staying put may be the wiser course.
lines_en.4: You cannot move forward alone. Look for what or who might assist you.
lines_en.5: The situation is dire, but help is closer than it appears.
lines_en.6: Do not struggle alone. Seek counsel and guidance. The larger conditions need improving.

name: 雷水解
keywords_en: release, resolution, liberation, fresh start, loosening, natural easing, break free
judgment_en: Deliverance. The southwest furthers. No blame in returning. Going forward brings good fortune.
symbolism_en: What was frozen begins to thaw. Long-held tension eases and the way forward opens. Do not cling to what is already dissolving. Move with the loosening current, and let what has been bound come undone naturally.

lines_en.1: Things are resolving of their own accord. Watch calmly and allow it.
lines_en.2: Go after what you want directly. This is the moment to act.
lines_en.3: You may be overcomplicating the solution. Know your limits.
lines_en.4: Release what does not belong. After clearing away, what is truly necessary will appear.
lines_en.5: The matter is fully resolved. Leave it behind without looking back and move to the next.
lines_en.6: Commit to the final clearing. The problem resolves in one decisive action.

name: 山沢損
keywords_en: decrease, offering, sacrifice, altruism, simplification, restraint, giving, long-term benefit
judgment_en: Decrease with sincerity brings supreme good fortune. No blame. Perseverance furthers.
symbolism_en: To reduce is sometimes to gain. What appears to be loss — giving, yielding, letting go — creates the conditions for real abundance. Putting others before yourself, or the whole before the part, comes back in ways you did not plan.

lines_en.1: Act without delay. Give priority now — it is a necessary investment in what lies ahead.
lines_en.2: Do not involve yourself here. This is not your problem. Staying out is the more beneficial choice.
lines_en.3: The time has come to simplify and pare down. Focus your aims more sharply.
lines_en.4: Reduce what is unnecessary quickly and the dark, stagnant current will clear. Good results follow.
lines_en.5: After the reduction, something remarkable flows in. Receive it fully and without hesitation.
lines_en.6: Take the broadest view and attend to what benefits the whole. To give without holding back is, in the long run, your own gain.

name: 風雷益
keywords_en: increase, abundance, opportunity, mutual aid, tailwind, generosity, expansion
judgment_en: Increase. It furthers to undertake something. It furthers to cross great waters.
symbolism_en: Not only do you receive — you give, and the whole is enriched. Benefit flows naturally toward those who act with sincerity. A favorable current is running. Those who move with open hands will find that what they offer returns to them multiplied.

lines_en.1: Everything needed for the undertaking is already there. There is nothing to do but begin.
lines_en.2: What comes in will increase steadily. A powerful tailwind accelerates the growth.
lines_en.3: When something beyond your control occurs, it is right to ask for help. Ask sincerely.
lines_en.4: State clearly what you need and ask for it directly. The act of asking opens the channel.
lines_en.5: A productive cycle is established and abundance grows. You and those around you are mutually benefiting.
lines_en.6: You are moving from short-term gain toward a larger and fairer perspective. Expand your vision.

name: 沢天夬
keywords_en: decision, breakthrough, elimination, resolve, clarity, courage, purification, forward thrust
judgment_en: Breakthrough. One must resolutely make the matter known. Danger. Do not rely on force alone.
symbolism_en: The moment of decision has arrived. What is harmful or obstructive must be named and removed — not through brute force, but through clear judgment and principled action. Hesitation is the only real danger. Act from conviction, not from anger.

lines_en.1: The spirit is willing but the strength is not. Pull back across the board.
lines_en.2: Proceed carefully, watching for the decisive moment. The situation is still unstable.
lines_en.3: Aggression will provoke resistance and backfire. Composure will succeed where force will not.
lines_en.4: Stop trying to control it and let the current carry you. Forcing a resolution is what makes it difficult.
lines_en.5: Cut what must be cut, without sentiment. Do not allow emotion to bargain with what must go.
lines_en.6: The final move has been made — now step through. You have thought it through enough. No regret.

name: 天風姤
keywords_en: encounter, serendipity, temptation, attraction, caution, impulsiveness, do not go too deep
judgment_en: Coming to meet. The woman is bold. Do not pursue such a woman.
symbolism_en: Something arrives without warning — an encounter, a temptation, an unexpected proposal. The attraction may be genuine, but it is also fleeting. Do not be swept away. Maintain your perspective and your distance. What seems like destiny may only be a distraction.

lines_en.1: You are restless — but do not surrender to the impulse. The test here is whether you can hold yourself.
lines_en.2: Contain the desire that has arisen. Do not chase what has appeared. Let it go.
lines_en.3: You cannot stay still and yet cannot move forward. Endurance is what is called for.
lines_en.4: This desire has no real prospect. Release it. You are pursuing something that does not exist.
lines_en.5: You accept what is unwelcome and hold it with equanimity. An unexpected gift may follow.
lines_en.6: You are moving away from what disturbs you and returning to your own stillness. No need to worry.

name: 沢地萃
keywords_en: gathering, community, network, collective strength, convergence, abundance, cooperation
judgment_en: Gathering together. Success. The king approaches his temple. Perseverance furthers.
symbolism_en: People gather and power is born from the gathering. Cooperation, community, and collective effort make possible what solitary effort cannot. Seek others out and bring them together — or allow yourself to be drawn into the larger current that is already forming.

lines_en.1: Begin by gathering your scattered thoughts. From that clarity, a current will emerge.
lines_en.2: Reach toward what you want with an open heart. If the desire is genuine, it will be answered.
lines_en.3: Conditions are not yet ripe and there is nothing to collect. Simply keep moving steadily forward.
lines_en.4: An auspicious convergence of forces surrounds you. More comes to you than your ability strictly warrants — stay focused.
lines_en.5: You know clearly what you are doing and why. Some uncertainty may remain, but you are on the right path.
lines_en.6: You have lost the thread and drifted from the current. A transition: decide whether to go on alone or return.

name: 地風升
keywords_en: growth, ascent, advancement, gradual progress, sincerity, supported rise, patience
judgment_en: Pushing upward. Sublime success. It furthers to see the great man.
symbolism_en: Growth from within, rising steadily without haste. Effort and integrity move things gradually in the right direction. Support comes from others, but self-reliance and honest application are what sustain the ascent.

lines_en.1: Growth is assured at this stage. Learn as much as you can.
lines_en.2: Trust your own development simply and honestly. Sincerity carries you upward without need for pretense.
lines_en.3: The ascent is going very smoothly. If it feels unremarkable, that is the sign that it is working.
lines_en.4: Honor the propriety of the situation and treat it with due respect. Better results will follow.
lines_en.5: The path upward is clear and solidly built. Support from below is also strong.
lines_en.6: There is no further to go in this direction. You have reached what can be reached. Find a new horizon.

name: 沢水困
keywords_en: hardship, constriction, adversity, trial, misunderstanding, limitation, inner strength, endurance
judgment_en: Oppression. Success. Perseverance. It furthers to see the great man.
symbolism_en: No way out is visible. The pressure comes from every side. Yet it is precisely in this extremity that genuine character is forged. Turn inward, not outward. Sincerity and self-trust are the only tools that work here.

lines_en.1: Nothing but endurance is asked of you now. Do not rush. Simply bear it.
lines_en.2: More than you can hold arrives and weighs on you. Do not refuse it — there may be a reason.
lines_en.3: You can neither advance nor stop, and you belong nowhere. This is only a passage. Wait for the current to shift.
lines_en.4: Slow progress is still progress. Keep at it without giving up.
lines_en.5: Relief is near. Do not abandon the effort or throw it away at the last.
lines_en.6: Reflect on how you came to be in this difficulty. The way out depends on your own change of attitude.

name: 水風井
keywords_en: depth, continuity, utility, service, inner resource, community good, timeless value, perseverance
judgment_en: The well. The town may be moved, but not the well. No loss, no gain.
symbolism_en: The well does not move and does not run dry. Whatever changes around it, its water remains available to all who come to draw. This is a time to attend to what is essential and enduring — not the fashionable or the visible, but the deep and the faithful.

lines_en.1: Your real worth is not coming through yet. Begin by settling your own inner state.
lines_en.2: Vitality is slowly returning. Start by strengthening the foundations.
lines_en.3: The will is there, but the opportunity has not yet appeared. Wait for your moment.
lines_en.4: Prepare so that when the moment comes, you are already ready. Make the environment right.
lines_en.5: Your potential is recognized and called upon. Fulfilling work lies ahead.
lines_en.6: Inexhaustible energy is available. The possibilities before you have no ceiling.

name: 沢火革
keywords_en: change, transformation, renewal, reform, shedding the old, decisive break, fresh start
judgment_en: Revolution. On your own day you are believed. Sublime success. Perseverance furthers. Remorse vanishes.
symbolism_en: When the old form has reached its limit, change is not only possible — it is necessary. Old habits, relationships, and identities that no longer serve must be shed. The fear of change is the only real obstacle. Act with conviction when the moment is right.

lines_en.1: The eve of revolution. The moment has not yet come — hold still and do not act.
lines_en.2: The time to act is now. If you are going to move, this is the moment. Commit and go forward.
lines_en.3: Momentum alone is dangerous. Review, reconsider, and plan carefully before taking action.
lines_en.4: You are already in the midst of transformation. Carry out what must be done with full conviction.
lines_en.5: The reform is succeeding. A new era is beginning to open.
lines_en.6: The transformation is complete. Things have changed. It is still unsettled — surrender to the new order.

name: 火風鼎
keywords_en: transformation, culture, nourishment, harmony, balance, cooperation, refinement, new structure
judgment_en: The cauldron. Sublime good fortune. Success.
symbolism_en: Different elements combine in the vessel and something new is created. A new structure, a new culture, a new form of harmony. What is prepared with care and offered with sincerity nourishes all who partake. Trust and mutual respect are what hold the vessel together.

lines_en.1: What seems bad at first becomes the opening for something good.
lines_en.2: You are solid and stable. Even what tries to undermine you can be shaken off with composure.
lines_en.3: You have the energy to move but the way is blocked. Be patient — the problem will eventually resolve.
lines_en.4: The weight may be more than fits you. Consider carefully whether this is truly yours to carry.
lines_en.5: What comes to you is proportionate to who you are. Stay on your path and it will go well.
lines_en.6: Beautiful stability and balance. Move forward with confidence.

name: 震為雷
keywords_en: shock, awakening, surprise, disruption, fear, vitality, transformation through disturbance
judgment_en: Shock brings success. Shock comes — oh, oh. Then laughing words. The shock terrifies for a hundred miles.
symbolism_en: The thunder strikes without warning. Fear, then clarity. What shakes you is not necessarily your enemy — it may be what wakes you. Through the disturbance, you are given the chance to face what you had been avoiding. The initial terror gives way, and what remains is more alive than before.

lines_en.1: You may be shaken. But the fear is brief. In time this will be something you can laugh about.
lines_en.2: Avoid the immediate danger and move to safer ground. What you need will return to you.
lines_en.3: The shock clouds your judgment. Do not remain captured by it — recover your reason and act appropriately.
lines_en.4: The force of the shock is weak and things stall. Indecision and inertia set in.
lines_en.5: Do not flee — face it steadily. Calm judgment will see you through.
lines_en.6: The shock has contracted your spirit. Lift your eyes and look at the situation — it may be simpler than it appears.

name: 艮為山
keywords_en: stillness, stopping, inner calm, restraint, meditation, pause, composure, silence
judgment_en: Keeping still. Keeping his back still. He does not obtain his body. Goes into his courtyard and does not see his people. No blame.
symbolism_en: The mountain does not move. In stopping — genuinely stopping, not merely waiting — the mind clears and the inner voice becomes audible. Impulse checked, emotion stilled: this is where truth is found. Silence is not absence. It is presence of another kind.

lines_en.1: Rather than rushing to resolve things, first quiet yourself. Do not be pulled about by what surrounds you.
lines_en.2: You do not wish to be disturbed, yet something unsettles you. That is unavoidable — but return to stillness as best you can.
lines_en.3: Rigid stillness brings its own pain. You cannot solve this now — release the attachment.
lines_en.4: You are maintaining equanimity. Continue as you are.
lines_en.5: Watch your words. Complaints and weakness spoken aloud will unsettle the very calm you are trying to hold.
lines_en.6: You have reached a state of genuine stillness. No wavering, no doubt. This is admirable.

name: 風山漸
keywords_en: gradual development, step by step, patience, steady growth, maturation, order, proper sequence
judgment_en: Development. The maiden is given in marriage. Good fortune. Perseverance furthers.
symbolism_en: One step at a time, without haste. Deep bonds and lasting achievements are not built quickly. Each stage prepares the next. Trust the process, honor the sequence, and do not skip steps simply because you are impatient to arrive.

lines_en.1: Confidence is lacking and the way forward feels uncertain. Take one small, sure step.
lines_en.2: Progress is steady and a sense of ease is beginning to settle in. The road ahead is level.
lines_en.3: There is a tendency to stray from the path. Stay alert to prevent problems before they arise.
lines_en.4: You are moving into unfamiliar territory. There may be unease, but you will find your footing gradually.
lines_en.5: You are advancing to higher ground. Results may not be immediate, but the trajectory is sound.
lines_en.6: You have passed through every obstacle. The flight is beginning. What you have learned now carries you to glory.

name: 雷沢帰妹
keywords_en: haste, misalignment, impulse, disorder, wrong timing, emotional misjudgment, instability
judgment_en: The marrying maiden. Undertakings bring misfortune. Nothing that would further.
symbolism_en: Moved by feeling and momentum rather than by judgment. The timing is wrong, the foundation is missing, the sequence has been skipped. What is rushed without proper grounding will not last. Reason and sincerity must temper desire.

lines_en.1: Even if the path is difficult, if it is truly yours, walk it.
lines_en.2: Progress is slow and effort yields little. It is painful — but do not leave the road.
lines_en.3: You want to advance but obstacles block every turn. Consider carefully: wait, or find another way.
lines_en.4: You may miss the moment — but do not panic into a wrong path. Wait for the right one.
lines_en.5: The right way is shown to you. Follow it without resistance, even if it seems modest.
lines_en.6: A fresh start is being forced upon you. There is no way to make this work. Accept it and let go.

name: 雷火豊
keywords_en: abundance, peak, prosperity, fullness, brilliance, decisive action, vitality, the height of fortune
judgment_en: Abundance. Success. The king attains abundance. Be not sad. Be like the sun at midday.
symbolism_en: The moment of greatest fullness. Things develop on a large scale and draw attention. Yet the sun at noon has already begun its descent. Receive this time fully — and hold it with perspective. What is at its height is also, already, turning.

lines_en.1: Vitality surges through you without restraint. Advance energetically. The prospects are excellent.
lines_en.2: The shadow is deep. Move with sincerity and active effort to bring light into the darkness.
lines_en.3: The darkness ahead is not your fault. Even if you cannot resolve it, keep the light turned toward it.
lines_en.4: You need help. Gather your forces and add to your light. Good results will follow.
lines_en.5: Your wisdom is itself a light. You are capable of great things — but do not let that become arrogance.
lines_en.6: The descent from the peak begins. A time of awakening to one's own folly. Open the heart and move toward the light.

name: 火山旅
keywords_en: wandering, impermanence, solitude, instability, transience, displacement, provisional shelter
judgment_en: The wanderer. Success through smallness. Perseverance brings good fortune to the wanderer.
symbolism_en: Away from home, in a place that is not yours. Relationships and conditions here are temporary. Do not try to plant deep roots where the ground will not hold. Move with lightness, treat others with courtesy, and do not mistake a resting place for a destination.

lines_en.1: Anxiety clouds your view. Settle yourself and try to think more openly and calmly.
lines_en.2: The journey is comfortable and you have what you need. Continue at this pace. Do not rush.
lines_en.3: Trouble follows trouble and you cannot relax. Conditions are poor and unstable — do not push aggressively.
lines_en.4: You have found a temporary place to rest, but the journey is not yet over. You must continue.
lines_en.5: You lose your way along the road, but you will arrive at your destination in the end. The journey is nearly done.
lines_en.6: One journey ends — and already the next begins. Do not become complacent. Gather yourself.

name: 巽為風
keywords_en: gentleness, penetration, adaptability, persuasion, subtlety, flexibility, gradual influence
judgment_en: The gentle. Success through small matters. Perseverance furthers.
symbolism_en: Wind does not force its way — it finds every opening and passes through. What cannot be moved by pressure may be transformed by patient, gentle persistence. Yield where necessary, and enter where you can. The soft outlasts the hard.

lines_en.1: You waver between acting and not acting. Decide on one course and hold to it.
lines_en.2: If it truly matters, approach it with full sincerity and humility. Thoroughness is what produces results.
lines_en.3: You are doing what you do not believe in and it shows. Without inner conviction, the outcome will not come. Change direction.
lines_en.4: You are finding your way in without forcing it. Flexibility allows you to take in what is needed from every side.
lines_en.5: Gentle persistence and careful adjustment bring what seemed impossible into reach.
lines_en.6: You have become excessively self-effacing and lost touch with your own judgment. Recover your own ground first.

name: 兌為沢
keywords_en: joy, openness, communication, warmth, shared pleasure, persuasion, gentle exchange, simple happiness
judgment_en: The joyous. Success. Perseverance furthers.
symbolism_en: The joy that arises naturally between people — not sought, not performed. A smile that comes from within. The quality of everyday human connection is what gives life its texture. What is shared lightly and sincerely enriches both giver and receiver.

lines_en.1: Joy arising from a pure source spreads outward of its own accord. A good time.
lines_en.2: Sincerity is what brings genuine happiness. Tend to trust in your relationships.
lines_en.3: What you are wearing now is a false smile. Look for what would bring real joy, not just its appearance.
lines_en.4: The mind is unsettled and pulled in different directions. Resist the temptation and choose the path that leads to lasting joy.
lines_en.5: You are susceptible to flattery and surface praise right now. Make sure the situation truly warrants your satisfaction.
lines_en.6: The atmosphere seems cheerful and the smiles appear genuine — but look more carefully. Ask your own heart.

name: 風水渙
keywords_en: release, dispersion, dissolution, letting go, clearing away, new flow, liberation, reset
judgment_en: Dispersion. Success. The king approaches his temple. It furthers to cross great waters.
symbolism_en: What has hardened and accumulated — resentment, attachment, old grief — begins to dissolve and flow. Release is not loss. What you stop clutching can finally move. New energy enters only where the old has been cleared away.

lines_en.1: The beginning matters. Shake off the heaviness and move through it with momentum.
lines_en.2: Your mind is steady and undisturbed. Continue. The real work lies ahead.
lines_en.3: Set aside self-interest and clear the mind. Once the noise is gone, the way becomes visible.
lines_en.4: Dissolve what is small and private in service of something larger. A view opens that belongs to you alone.
lines_en.5: A large and irrevocable decision must be made. Be prepared to pay the cost. Commit fully.
lines_en.6: Old suffering and difficulty scatter like clouds. A new stage opens in the distance.

name: 水沢節
keywords_en: limitation, restraint, moderation, self-discipline, boundaries, sustainability, propriety, balance
judgment_en: Limitation. Success. Bitter limitation must not be persevered in.
symbolism_en: Limits are not obstacles — they are the conditions for lasting form. Without banks, a river has no direction. Without restraint, energy dissipates. The right limit, chosen wisely, makes sustainable progress possible. The discipline that feels like a cage may be what keeps you whole.

lines_en.1: You are holding yourself to an appropriate measure without excess. Continue as you are.
lines_en.2: You are restraining yourself too much. In trying to find balance you may have become too passive.
lines_en.3: You have exceeded your limits in various ways. The consequences will fall on you — exercise stronger will.
lines_en.4: You maintain good balance without forcing it. Preserve this ease of mind and body.
lines_en.5: You hold an excellent equilibrium and it affects those around you positively. You are in a good state.
lines_en.6: The limitation you have imposed on yourself is too rigid and unnatural. Too much of anything becomes its own poison. Allow some loosening.

name: 風沢中孚
keywords_en: inner truth, sincerity, trust, faith, genuine feeling, resonance, integrity, what cannot be faked
judgment_en: Inner truth. Pigs and fishes. Good fortune. It furthers to cross great waters. Perseverance furthers.
symbolism_en: What is true at the center reaches outward without effort. The hen warms the egg with her whole body — not with words, not with display. Sincerity that is real needs no announcement. And it moves even what seems unmovable.

lines_en.1: Only genuine sincerity opens the way. Ask yourself honestly whether this is truly where your heart belongs.
lines_en.2: A pure intention reaches others. Sincerity draws a sincere response.
lines_en.3: You are disturbed and unsteady, pulled by emotion. Slow down and look clearly at what the real problem is.
lines_en.4: What is impure in you is being cleared away. Release what no longer belongs without holding on.
lines_en.5: Your genuine feeling is met with a genuine response. The connection holds. No problem.
lines_en.6: Your conviction has become self-righteous and isolated. Return to common ground. Make the effort.

name: 雷山小過
keywords_en: smallness, modesty, caution, minor matters, restraint, hidden effort, avoid excess, know your place
judgment_en: Preponderance of the small. Success. Perseverance furthers. Small things may be done; great things should not be done.
symbolism_en: This is not a time for great ambitions. Quiet correctness, invisible effort, unheroic sincerity — these are what the moment asks for. The bird that flies too high loses its way. Stay close to the ground. Small is not lesser — it is what the season requires.

lines_en.1: Do not reach for height. Hold back from initiating. The restrained path is, paradoxically, the one that works.
lines_en.2: Accept a slightly lesser outcome than you originally aimed for. That adjustment is the right one.
lines_en.3: Stay quiet and unassuming. Do not aim high — simply endure this passage.
lines_en.4: A passive stance is generally correct here, but watch for the moment when action becomes necessary.
lines_en.5: You are in a frustrating in-between state. Small efforts will not shift things significantly.
lines_en.6: Reaching upward invites misfortune. Descending, or simply staying low, allows things to proceed more peacefully.

name: 水火既済
keywords_en: completion, order, achievement, impermanence, vigilance after success, the moment decay begins
judgment_en: After completion. Success in small matters. Perseverance furthers. At the beginning good fortune, at the end disorder.
symbolism_en: All is in order — and that is precisely the danger. Completion is not a destination but a moment, and from that moment the unraveling begins. Nothing stays accomplished without continued attention. The one who rests too easily at the summit is already descending.

lines_en.1: It is already done — do not press further. Watch for the signs that tell you to stop.
lines_en.2: The way forward is not yet open. Wait without forcing. The right moment will come of itself.
lines_en.3: What you are undertaking will take far longer than expected. Commit to the long span.
lines_en.4: Do not relax simply because you are nearly there. Prepare carefully for what could still go wrong.
lines_en.5: Good results have come. Do not become attached to the form of your success. Return to first principles.
lines_en.6: The outcome is already determined. To attempt something large now risks serious failure. Hold your position.

name: 火水未済
keywords_en: incompleteness, transition, potential, preparation, the unfinished, hope, the journey continues
judgment_en: Before completion. Success. The young fox, after nearly completing the crossing, gets its tail in the water. No blame.
symbolism_en: The last hexagram is unfinished — and that is its meaning. No life arrives at completion. The way continues beyond every threshold, every achievement, every ending. The light is not at the destination. It lives in the walking itself.

lines_en.1: Neither the strength nor the timing is right. Whatever you attempt will fall short. Be patient.
lines_en.2: The will is there but the moment has not come. Hold back. Recognizing that is itself the right judgment.
lines_en.3: This is a good time for large ambitions — but they cannot be realized yet.
lines_en.4: Do you have the resolve to sustain a long effort? If so, the goal will be reached with distinction.
lines_en.5: You are on the best possible path and moving directly toward completion. Continue with confidence.
lines_en.6: Completion is near. Enjoy what remains of the process. The arrival is close.
